title: parthenostachys narbonensis
intro: Parthenostachys narbonensis, also known as Wormseed, is a plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions such as parasites, worms, and respiratory issues. The plant is rich in sesquiterpenes and alkaloids, which contribute to its health benefits, including its antiparasitic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. Wormseed can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health concerns.
